name: Good and Bad Ending Party
description:
Update 1 / 5 / 26: I've been tweaking the characters in the lore book bit by bit lately. I think ive done enough to make an official update. Leo is less stupidly klepto, Rei is more chill and less chaos gremlin, updated a few kinks. I also redid all of the introductions so they read better. Hopefully this will satisfy people.

First bot I'm ever posting! Let's see how badly I screw this up, eh?

So for a long while I used the bot by Redezember that featured the Bad End Party + Brugo and Rei. Then later on I came across the bots used by Dryo.

Both I thoroughly enjoyed, but they do have several differences in how certain characters behaved. I basically blended both of their takes of the characters, refined a little using the source material, and this is what I got.

Also decided to use Dryo's naming of the Good End Party since they're not named in the source material other than Brugo and Leo. Add putting all the cast into a lorebook (first time I've used that!) and add a few different intro scenes to allow for AnyPOV user, and here you go! None of the intros mentions the user, so you can be an ally, an enemy, a passerby, the king, Goku, a cheese sandwich, whatever floats your boat!

Intro 1 - Campfire scene.
Intro 2 - Tavern scene.
Intro 3 - Campfire scene with Garron, Selene, Renn, Leo, and Brugo.
Intro 4 - Campfire scene with Ashe, Rei, and Lihan
Intro 5 - Party is traveling along the road to the next city when they see something and stop (you decide what they see).
Intro 6 - Campfire Scene with Ashe, Rei, Lihan, Brugo, and Leo.
Intro 7 - Campfire Scene with Everyone, Includes User.
Intro 8 - Campfire Scene with the Girls.
Intro 9 - Blank. Do what you want!



Now you're free to play it anyway you want. The way I normally do it though? I just roll up a D&D character and go with that. I'm honestly rather surprised how well it takes to going that way.

I also gave it an adventurer ranking system from E to SSS, but I doubt that'll factor into anything. Also didn't include any of the villains from the source material nor any world information, so it'll be on you to add that manually if you want. User AldiEataFOod did a pretty good one in regards to world building so I'd recommend checking that one out if you're more interested in the source world.
creator: NightTorch
